name: Cloudflare App Builder
description: An agent that builds full-stack web apps on Cloudflare Workers — React + Vite SPA with a Worker API backend, scaffolded, verified, and deployed per Cloudflare's framework guide.

secrets.name: CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN
secrets.description: API token with the 'Edit Cloudflare Workers' permission for the target account.

secrets.name: CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID
secrets.description: The Cloudflare account id the app deploys into.
